issue_summary: Initial work to support Map.Entry; now serialization works, some improvements to type handling as well
javadoc_before:
/** * Factory method for constructing {@link JavaType} that * represents a parameterized type. For example, to represent * type List<Set<Integer>>, you could * call *
     *  TypeFactory.parametricType(List.class, Integer.class);
     *
*

* NOTE: type modifiers are NOT called on constructed type itself; but are called * for contained types. */
